prompt:
Create a professional educational infographic, 16:9 landscape.
Layout: hub-spoke — center "docker compose up", spokes to six services.
Style: hand-drawn-edu, cream #F5F0E8, macaron pastels, stick figures, Simplified Chinese.

Title: RAG 全栈 Compose 服务拓扑

Center: docker compose（一键编排）

Spokes (clockwise):
1. frontend（Next.js :3000）
2. api（FastAPI :8000）
3. worker（Celery 索引）
4. postgres（元数据）
5. redis（队列 + 缓存）
6. chroma（向量库持久卷）

Side note: 同一 bridge 网络内用服务名互访，如 redis:6379

Footer: Docker Compose 全栈部署 · §3

Create a professional educational infographic, 16:9 landscape.
Layout: linear-progression left-to-right with arrows and health gates.
Style: hand-drawn-edu, cream #F5F0E8, macaron pastels, stick figures, Simplified Chinese.

Title: 依赖启动顺序与健康门闩

Steps:
1. postgres + redis 先 healthy
2. chroma 数据卷就绪
3. api 通过 /ready
4. worker 消费队列
5. frontend 代理到 api

Callout: depends_on + healthcheck 避免「假启动」

Footer: Docker Compose 全栈部署 · §6

Create a professional educational infographic, 16:9 landscape.
Layout: two-column comparison matrix.
Style: hand-drawn-edu, cream #F5F0E8, macaron pastels, stick figures, Simplified Chinese.

Title: 本地 Compose vs 生产部署

Left column 本地 Compose:
- 单节点、bind mount 热重载
- .env 开发密钥
- 全服务一台机

Right column 生产:
- K8s / 托管服务拆分
- Secret Manager、只读镜像
- 水平扩展 api/worker

Bottom: Compose 是阶段 5 验收跳板，不是终态

Footer: Docker Compose 全栈部署 · §10

Create educational infographic 16:9, hub-spoke.
Style: hand-drawn-edu, cream #F5F0E8, macaron pastels, stick figures, Simplified Chinese.

Title: RAG 组件在 K8s 里长什么样

Center: Kubernetes 集群

Spokes mapping:
- Deployment + Pod → api / worker
- StatefulSet → postgres（或云 RDS 外置）
- Service ClusterIP → redis / chroma 内网
- Ingress → frontend HTTPS 入口
- Secret → OPENAI_API_KEY
- ConfigMap → 非敏感配置

Footer: Kubernetes 基本概念 · §3

Create educational infographic 16:9, linear-progression left-to-right.
Style: hand-drawn-edu, cream #F5F0E8, macaron pastels, Simplified Chinese.

Title: 流量路径：Pod → Service → Ingress

Steps:
1. Pod（api 容器，多副本）
2. Service ClusterIP（稳定虚拟 IP + DNS api.rag.svc）
3. Ingress（TLS 终止，/api 路由）
4. 用户浏览器 HTTPS

Callout: Pod 会重启换 IP，Service 不变

Footer: Kubernetes 基本概念 · §5

Create educational infographic 16:9, two-column comparison.
Style: hand-drawn-edu, cream #F5F0E8, macaron pastels, Simplified Chinese.

Title: Docker Compose vs Kubernetes（RAG 全栈）

Rows compare: 编排单位、扩缩容、服务发现、密钥、存储、适用阶段

Left: Compose 单机 PoC
Right: K8s 生产多副本

Bottom: 203 Compose 学拓扑，204 K8s 学编排语言

Footer: Kubernetes 基本概念 · §9

Create educational infographic 16:9.
Style: hand-drawn-edu, cream #F5F0E8, macaron pastels, Simplified Chinese.

Title: API Key 泄露的四条典型路径

Steps with red X icons:
1. 写进源码 commit
2. 打进 Docker 镜像层
3. 前端 NEXT_PUBLIC_ 暴露
4. 日志打印完整 Key

Green check: 环境变量 / Secret Manager 运行时注入

Footer: 密钥管理 · §3

Create educational infographic 16:9, hub-spoke.
Style: hand-drawn-edu, cream #F5F0E8, macaron pastels, Simplified Chinese.

Title: 十二要素：配置在环境，不在代码

Center: 同一份镜像

Spokes: dev .env / CI GitHub Secret / Compose secrets / K8s Secret / 云 Secret Manager

Footer: 密钥管理 · §5

Create educational infographic 16:9.
Style: hand-drawn-edu, cream #F5F0E8, macaron pastels, Simplified Chinese.

Title: 密钥轮换不改代码

Steps:
1. 云控制台生成新 Key
2. 更新 Secret / .env
3. 滚动重启 api + worker
4. 观察错误率归零
5. 吊销旧 Key

Footer: 密钥管理 · §8

Create educational infographic 16:9, two-column.
Style: hand-drawn-edu, cream #F5F0E8, macaron pastels, Simplified Chinese.

Title: /health 与 /ready 分工

Left /health（存活）:
- 进程活着即可
- 失败 → 重启
- 不查外部 LLM

Right /ready（就绪）:
- Postgres Redis Chroma 连通
- 失败 → 摘流量
- 不重启

Footer: 健康检查 · §3

Create educational infographic 16:9.
Style: hand-drawn-edu, cream #F5F0E8, macaron pastels, Simplified Chinese.

Title: 负载均衡器探针决策

Flow: 请求 → LB 查 ready → 仅 ready 副本接流量 → liveness 失败则重启 Pod

Footer: 健康检查 · §6

Create educational infographic 16:9, hub-spoke.
Style: hand-drawn-edu, cream #F5F0E8, macaron pastels, Simplified Chinese.

Title: RAG API /ready 应检查什么

Center: GET /ready

Spokes: postgres ping, redis ping, chroma heartbeat, 可选 migrations 版本

Crossed out spoke: OpenAI API 实时调用

Footer: 健康检查 · §7

Create educational infographic 16:9.
Style: hand-drawn-edu, cream #F5F0E8, macaron pastels, Simplified Chinese.

Title: 纯文本日志 vs JSON 结构化日志

Left: 多行 printf 难以 grep
Right: 一行一 JSON，level event trace_id latency_ms

Footer: 结构化日志 · §3

Create educational infographic 16:9, hub-spoke.
Style: hand-drawn-edu, cream #F5F0E8, macaron pastels, Simplified Chinese.

Footer: 结构化日志 · §5

Create educational infographic 16:9.
Style: hand-drawn-edu, cream #F5F0E8, macaron pastels, Simplified Chinese.

Title: trace_id 贯穿 upload → worker → query

Steps: 前端请求带 X-Trace-Id → api 日志 → celery task → worker 日志 → rag query 同 id

Footer: 结构化日志 · §7

Create educational infographic 16:9, hub-spoke.
Style: hand-drawn-edu, cream #F5F0E8, macaron pastels, Simplified Chinese.

Center: prometheus_client

Create educational infographic 16:9.
Style: hand-drawn-edu, cream #F5F0E8, macaron pastels, Simplified Chinese.

Title: RAG 服务四类观测

Blocks: 延迟（query P95）, 流量（QPS）, 错误（5xx/429）, 饱和度（队列深度 worker CPU）

Create educational infographic 16:9.
Style: hand-drawn-edu, cream #F5F0E8, macaron pastels, Simplified Chinese.

Title: /metrics 抓取路径

Flow: api Pod :8000/metrics → Prometheus scrape → Grafana 看板 → 告警

Footer: Prometheus 指标 · §8

Create educational infographic 16:9.
Style: hand-drawn-edu, cream #F5F0E8, macaron pastels, Simplified Chinese.

Title: Embedding 索引成本估算

Formula flow: 总 chunk 数 × 每 chunk token 数 × 单价/1M tokens = 索引 Embedding 费用

Side: 重索引要乘版本次数

Footer: Embedding 批次成本 · §4

Create educational infographic 16:9, two columns.
Style: hand-drawn-edu, cream #F5F0E8, macaron pastels, Simplified Chinese.

Title: 逐条 embed vs 批量 embed

Left 逐条: 高 RPM 风险、慢、请求开销大
Right 批量: 同 token 费、低 RPM、高吞吐（67 篇）

Footer: Embedding 批次成本 · §6

Create educational infographic 16:9, hub-spoke.
Style: hand-drawn-edu, cream #F5F0E8, macaron pastels, Simplified Chinese.

Title: 十万 chunk 索引预算拆解

Center: 总费用

Spokes: 解析免费本地 CPU, embed API token, 向量存储（193 预告）, 重试冗余 10%

Links: 27 token 计费, 67 批量策略

Footer: Embedding 批次成本 · §9
